channel.title: Scilab on macOS (Apple Silicon) — fork news
channel.description: News for the macOS / Scilab 2027 fork: native Apple-Silicon builds, the standalone app, and the toolbox ecosystem.

item.title: Toolbox manager is now a core Scilab module
item.description: The tbxManager() picker and the tbx* verbs now load in every Scilab session as an intrinsic module.
item.content:encoded:
The toolbox manager has been promoted from a sideloaded macro library to an intrinsic Scilab module (modules/toolbox_manager). The verbs are available in every session:

  • tbxManager() — GUI check-list with Apply & Relaunch
  • tbxInstall / tbxUpdate / tbxRemove / tbxList
  • tbxHelp() — in-console reference for every verb

Toolboxes are remembered in a manifest and autoloaded at startup.

item.title: Standalone Scilab-2027.0.0.app for macOS
item.description: A relocatable /Applications app built with package-macos.sh — configurable JDK, isolated config, one-command refresh.
item.content:encoded:
package-macos.sh turns the dev build into an independent /Applications/Scilab-2027.0.0.app for daily use, decoupled from the source tree:

  • Configurable JDK (~/.config/scilab-app/java_home)
  • Its own isolated SCIHOME
  • A scilab2027 console on your PATH
  • Incremental refresh after every rebuild

item.title: 50 toolboxes ported to macOS / Scilab 2027
item.description: <HTML>cgal, sndfile, parquet, xlsx, libsvm, scicv, sciDatabase and more — rebuilt from source for Apple Silicon.
item.content:encoded:
A growing set of toolboxes has been ported and rebuilt from source for macOS arm64 / Scilab 2027, each mirrored to gitlab.com/jlmoya:

  • Geometry & data: cgal, parquet, xlsx, sndfile
  • ML & CV: libsvm, scicv
  • Databases: sciDatabase (5 engines)

The sndfile port even fixed a real upstream multi-buffer write bug.

item.title: Scilab branch-2027.0 builds natively on Apple Silicon
item.description: A full from-source build on macOS arm64 with JDK 25 — Homebrew deps + the JOGL/deployment-target fixes.
item.content:encoded: Scilab branch-2027.0 now builds and runs from source on macOS arm64 (tested on macOS 26), with the GUI, plotting and virtual threads working under JDK 25. The full handbook — Homebrew dependencies, the deployment-target / JOGL startup fix, runtime dylib fixes — is in docs/building/macos.md.
